ItacAcademyItem.Name: Virtuosi (Accademia dei)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: This Academy met on Sundays, in summer months, to discuss passages from the Scriptures, and other themes of general interest. Here are some exsamples: exegetic themes; `Buoni e cattivi Principi` (Girolamo Preti); `Sopra la buona et cattiva fortuna in sensi morali` (Bolognetti, Servita); `Sopra l`adulatione` (De Rosis); `Sulla curiosita`; `Sulla saggezza e la battaglia tra Davide e Golia`.
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
